ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the project's code repository */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the project */,
  "spend" REAL /* Amount spent on the project so far */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client for the project */,
  "client_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the client */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commits" (
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit */,
  "hash" TEXT /* Hash of the commit */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the commit belongs to */,
  "commit_date" TEXT /* Date of the commit */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who made the commit */,
  "message" TEXT /* Commit message */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch the commit was made to */,
  "commit_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the commit */,
  "commit_size" INTEGER /* Size of the commit in bytes */,
  "commit_origin" TEXT /* Origin of the commit (e.g., local, remote) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commit_metrics" (
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit */,
  "num_files" INTEGER /* Number of files changed in the commit */,
  "entropy" REAL /* Entropy of the commit */,
  "lines_added" INTEGER /* Number of lines added in the commit */,
  "lines_deleted" INTEGER /* Number of lines deleted in the commit */,
  "lines_test" INTEGER /* Number of lines of test code added in the commit */,
  "fixes" INTEGER /* Number of bug fixes in the commit */,
  "num_bugs" INTEGER /* Number of bugs introduced in the commit */,
  "relative_churn" REAL /* Relative churn (lines added + lines deleted) / lines of test */,
  "relative_lines_test" REAL /* Relative lines of test (lines of test / number of files) */,
  "is_buggy" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the commit introduced bugs */,
  "commit_version" INTEGER /* Version of the commit metrics (for versioning) */,
  "commit_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the commit process in seconds */,
  "code_complexity" REAL /* Code complexity metric */,
  "code_coverage" REAL /* Code coverage percentage */,
  "test_coverage" REAL /* Test coverage percentage */,
  "code_smells" INTEGER /* Number of code smells identified */,
  "duplicated_lines" INTEGER /* Number of duplicated lines of code */,
  "cognitive_complexity" INTEGER /* Cognitive complexity of the commit */,
  "technical_debt" INTEGER /* Technical debt introduced by the commit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, QA, project manager) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the user is associated with */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string of user permissions */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the commit */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the commit was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code file */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file in the repository */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., .java, .py, .js) */,
  "file_version" INTEGER /* Version of the file (for versioning) */,
  "file_content" TEXT /* Content of the file (optional, for small files) */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file content */,
  "file_status" TEXT /* Status of the file (e.g., new, modified, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_files_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bug_reports" (
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bug report */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit the bug is associated with */,
  "bug_description" TEXT /* Description of the bug */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the bug (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to fix the bug */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the bug */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date the bug was reported */,
  "bug_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the bug (e.g., critical, high, medium, low) */,
  "bug_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the bug (e.g., urgent, high, medium, low) */,
  "bug_resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the bug was resolved */,
  "bug_resolution_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to resolve the bug in hours */,
  "bug_type" TEXT /* Type of the bug (e.g., functional, performance, security) */,
  "reproducibility" TEXT /* Reproducibility of the bug (e.g., always, sometimes, never) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_reports_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_reports_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_reports_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_metrics" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "total_lines_of_code" INTEGER /* Total lines of code in the project */,
  "total_bugs" INTEGER /* Total number of bugs in the project */,
  "average_entropy" REAL /* Average entropy across all commits in the project */,
  "total_commits" INTEGER /* Total number of commits in the project */,
  "last_commit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last commit in the project */,
  "total_test_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of test cases in the project */,
  "passed_test_cases" INTEGER /* Number of passed test cases */,
  "failed_test_cases" INTEGER /* Number of failed test cases */,
  "skipped_test_cases" INTEGER /* Number of skipped test cases */,
  "code_smells_count" INTEGER /* Total number of code smells in the project */,
  "duplicated_lines_count" INTEGER /* Total number of duplicated lines of code */,
  "technical_debt_count" INTEGER /* Total technical debt in the project */,
  "average_code_complexity" REAL /* Average code complexity across all commits */,
  "average_code_coverage" REAL /* Average code coverage percentage */,
  "average_test_coverage" REAL /* Average test coverage percentage */,
  "average_cognitive_complexity" REAL /* Average cognitive complexity across all commits */,
  "average_technical_debt" REAL /* Average technical debt across all commits */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)
